title: The Coal Mines Labour Welfare Fund (Repeal) Act, 1986
full_text: The Coal Mines Labour Welfare Fund (Repeal) Act, 1986 कोयला खान श्रम कल्‍याण निधि (निरसन) अधिनियम,1986 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198627 Act Number: 27 Enactment Date: 1986-05-23 Act Year: 1986 Short Title: The Coal Mines Labour Welfare Fund (Repeal) Act, 1986 Hindi Title: कोयला खान श्रम कल्‍याण निधि (निरसन) अधिनियम,1986 Long Title: An Act to repeal the Coal Mines Labour Welfare Fund Act, 1947 and to provide for certain matters incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Coal Enforcement Date: 01-10-1986 Notification: 1st October, 1986, vide notification No. S.O. 681(E), dated 19th September, 1986, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Last Updated: 08-04-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Coal Mines Labour Welfare Fund (Repeal) Act, 1986 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Repeal of Act 32 of 1947 and dissolution of Housing Board. Section 4. Consequential provisions. Section 5. Power of Central Government to direct vesting of rights in a Government company. Section 6. Continuation of suits, etc., against Central Government. Section 7. Moneys, etc., of the Fund to be credited to the Consolidated Fund of India. Section 8. Collection and payment of arrears of duty.
